HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[role-trusts] Reviewing high-signal identity trust edges and the clearest next review without implying delegated or admin consent.
ho-azure role-trusts

├────────────────────┼─────────┼────────┼──────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

│app-owner│azurefox-lab-sp│build-app│confirmed │Indirect control visible; ownership review next.│Review ownership around application 'build-app'; if it backs an Azure-facing identity, confirm that identity in permissions.│

Takeaway: 9 trust edges surfaced in full mode; 3 app-owner, 1 app-to-service-principal, 2 federated-credential, 3 service-principal-owner. 6 privilege-confirmation follow-ons, 3 ownership-review follow-ons, and 0 outside-tenant follow-ons. Delegated and admin consent grants are out of scope for this command.
